variants.name: 暗影
variants.ability: 每局游戏限一次，一名你投票的玩家可能在当晚死亡（且你会得知此事），但他会被当作存活直到他被处决。
variants.otherNightReminder: Wake the player marked "Dead". Show them the "This character selected you" info token, and then the Shade character token. Put them to sleep. They die, but do not announce this tomorrow morning.
variants.flavor: I worry that when I'm not looking, people I love are dying, and they aren't around to tell me.
